description_long: This is a stylish sneaker featuring a combination of beige, tan, and metallic gold panels, constructed from a mix of suede, synthetic leather, and textile materials. The shoe has a thick, white rubber sole with a slightly wedge-shaped profile, providing both height and cushioning. The upper includes multiple stitched overlays, with a padded collar and tongue for comfort. The lacing system uses standard eyelets and beige laces, while the heel area is reinforced with a metallic gold accent. The interior appears to be lined with a soft textile for added comfort. The overall design is modern and suitable for casual urban wear.
description: A beige and tan sneaker with metallic gold accents, thick white sole, and standard lacing. Features a modern, layered design with padded collar and reinforced heel.
description_view_0: Side view showing the layered beige and tan panels, metallic gold heel accent, and thick white sole.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded toe, standard criss-cross lacing, and padded tongue.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same color scheme and design details as the first side, with visible stitching and overlays.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the metallic gold heel accent, padded collar, and the back seam.
